# HostPulse

> Hospitality operations platform and Kenya-wide stays marketplace — reservations, housekeeping, billing, analytics, and a public directory of hotels, lodges, camps and villas across all 47 counties.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview for hosts, hotels, lodges, and tour operators.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, M-PESA and card billing, FAQs.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse verified stays across Kenya.
- [Map view](/marketplace/map): Search marketplace stays on a clustered map.
- [Hotel SEO guide](/guides/hotel-seo): Practical SEO playbook for hotels and lodges.
- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Access the operator workspace.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of all public URLs.
